title: 150PCS Pack of Curtain Hooks Plastic White, Curtain Glider Hooks, For Smooth Sliding, Universal Rail Gliders For Home, Track Gliders for Ceiling Drape Tracks
features: 【Size】 the length of hook is 26.7 mm, the width is 9.3 mm. Plastic curtain hooks can be easily fixed on the slides, not easy to fall off, can provide safe and reliable support.

【150-Piece Bulk Value】: This set includes 150 white plastic curtain hooks designed for standard tracks. Each hook features a rounded edge to prevent fabric snagging, perfect for replacing worn-out gliders in homes, hotels, or rental properties.

【Durable Plastic】: Made of plastic, these curtain rail gliders resist cracking, rust, and UV damage. The smooth surface ensures silent operation, ideal for bedrooms or nurseries where noise reduction matters.

【Quick Installation】: Simply install the curtain track hooks on the side of the track, and the smooth sliding is completed. Compatible with tension rods, ceiling tracks,hardness is enough to support the weight of the curtains

【Widely Used】: curtain glider hooks are widely used for doors, windows, shower curtains and curtains where there are curtain tracks, you can easily hang camper windows, track curtains. Essential for homeowners, hosts, or office managers. Use these plastic curtain hooks for patio doors, room dividers, shower curtains, or closet organizers. A cost-effective solution for rental upgrades!
